summary: The diff implements all requested requirements for the file upload feature. Backend methods for upload, retrieval, and listing are present in backend/main.mo. Frontend includes a new Files page with drag-and-drop upload, progress indicator, file list with download functionality, and proper routing/navigation integration. However, there are concerns about stable storage implementation and file ordering that may not fully meet acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implements stable storage to persist files across canister upgrades
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses Map.empty() for metadataMap and fileBlobMap without visible stable variable declarations. Without stable keyword or proper upgrade hooks, data will be lost on canister upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: Orders files by upload date (most recent first)
missing_requirements.reason: The listFiles() method returns files from metadataMap.entries() without any sorting logic. Map iteration order is not guaranteed to be by timestamp descending.
